'''Floating health spas''' were [[Freighter/Legends|barges]] located in the habitable [[Life Zone/Legends|Life Zone]] surrounding the gas giants [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraan]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Healthspa_ESB.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A spa seen from ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''{{'s}} cockpit.]]
These [[Freighter/Legends|barges]] were circular platforms under floating parasols, operated by a barge [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="The Illustrated Star Wars Universe" />

Doctors took dozens of patients into the mists of high-flying clouds, having them lie prone on the smooth deck while wearing wispy, sheetlike wraps, in order to receive the supposed therapeutic value of the atmospheric chemical haze in a so-called "cloud bath". The effectiveness of this treatment was never clinically proven, but many visitors to Bespin were lavish in their praise of the technique.<ref name="The Illustrated Star Wars Universe" />

==History==
These floating spas were located near colonies like [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="The Illustrated Star Wars Universe" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]
